allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/jobs' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Open roles we'\) { 'HERO: ok' } else { 'HERO: missing' }; if \($r.Content -match 'Senior Backend Engineer'\) { 'JOB1: ok' } else { 'JOB1: missing' }; if \($r.Content -match 'Engineering Manager'\) { 'JOB8: ok' } else { 'JOB8: missing' }; if \($r.Content -match 'Submit your CV'\) { 'CTA: ok' } else { 'CTA: missing' } } catch { "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Open roles'\) { 'NAV: ok' } else { 'NAV: missing' } } catch { "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "Port 3000 still in use by PID\(s\): $\($conn.OwningProcess -join ', '\)" } else { "Port 3000 free" })

PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://my-app.shinsenna2023.workers.dev/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "/   STATUS: $\($r1.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r1.Content.Length\)" } catch { "/   ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://my-app.shinsenna2023.workers.dev/jobs' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "/jobs STATUS: $\($r2.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r2.Content.Length\)"; if \($r2.Content -match 'Senior Backend Engineer'\) { '/jobs CONTENT: ok' } else { '/jobs CONTENT: missing job listings' } } catch { "/jobs ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8787/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Apex Talent'\) { 'CONTENT: ok' } else { 'CONTENT: unexpected' } } catch { "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import re,io; [print\(i,repr\(l.strip\(\)[:200]\)\) for i,l in enumerate\(io.open\('sign-letter.html',encoding='utf-8'\),1\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)]")

Bash(python -c "import re,io; out=io.open\('/tmp/ja_lines.txt','w',encoding='utf-8'\); [out.write\(f'{i}\\t{l.rstrip\(\)}\\n'\) for i,l in enumerate\(io.open\('supercs999.html',encoding='utf-8'\),1\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)]; out.close\(\)")
Bash(python -c "import re,io; print\(sum\(1 for l in io.open\('terms.html',encoding='utf-8'\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import re,io; print\(sum\(1 for l in io.open\('privacy.html',encoding='utf-8'\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import re,io; [print\(i, l.rstrip\(\)\) for i,l in enumerate\(io.open\('terms.html',encoding='utf-8'\),1\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)]")
Bash(python -c "import re,io; print\(sum\(1 for l in io.open\('superadmin999.html',encoding='utf-8'\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)\)\)")

Bash(git commit -m 'ui\(summary\): remove the 3 quick-stat tiles \(stops / walking / spend\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(wallet\): retention buffer releases after N completed sets \(was: first payout\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(dashboard\): set progress uses real plan count, not hardcoded 15 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(payout\): withdraw-all — lock amount to full available, no partials *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(summary\): transport labels reflect the real mode + day-form terminology *)
